channel.title: Finance on Techiedeepdive
channel.description: Recent content in Finance on Techiedeepdive

item.title: Stock Market Definitions
item.description: 52 week Range invest Define it as The 52-week range is a data point traditionally reported by printed financial news media, but more modernly included in data feeds from financial information sources online. The data point includes the lowest and highest price at which a stock has traded during the previous 52 weeks. Volume Volume is the amount of an asset or security that changes hands over some period of time, often over the course of a day.
